notes: Percent is within-series (denominator = each series' own N), so a large-N series does not visually swamp a small-N one; raw trial counts are retained per bar.
Explicit side-by-side drug comparison; no top-level drug entity so the primary query structure is centered on the comparison arms.
Breakdown requested is by lead sponsor type, mapped to sponsor_class.
'started in 2018 or later' mapped to start_year with startDate semantics implied by the start-year filter.
